issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response: If an interview session is in progress as the maintenance window downtime approaches, it may stop after showing warning messages to help finish in time. Interview data recorded before the maintenance window starts will be stored safely. For any refund request regarding the incomplete session, please escalate; the corpus does not specify refund policies.
justification: Anchored in data/hackerrank/general-help/important-notifications/2086891729-hackerrank-maintenance-window-notification.md — directly covers how maintenance windows can interrupt in-progress interview sessions with warnings and safe data storage.

issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To lock a user's access to the platform (preventing them from logging in), log in to your HackerRank for Work account, select your profile icon in the upper-right corner, and select Teams Management from the drop-down menu. Go to the Users tab, select one or more users, click More, and select Lock. In the Lock Users dialog, select a user under Transfer to to transfer resource ownership, then click Confirm.
justification: Anchored in data/hackerrank/settings/teams-management/6534774997-locking-user-access-from-hackerrank.md — directly covers locking user access via the More menu in the Users tab under Teams Management, including the prerequisite of Team Admin or Company Admin access.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: Contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card to dispute a charge. In many cases, your issuer or bank will require detailed information regarding the transaction before resolving the disputed charge.
justification: Anchored in data/visa/support.md — directly covers how to dispute a charge by contacting your issuer or bank.

issue: I am facing multiple issues in my project. all requests to claude with aws bedrock is failing
subject: Issues in Project
response: For Bedrock, confirm that `aws sts get-caller-identity` works and that `AWS_REGION` is set to a region where your model is enabled. Confirm that the specific Claude model is enabled in that region or project. As a quick workaround, run `/model` and select a model you know you have access to.
justification: Anchored in data/claude/claude-code/launch-guides/14552646-troubleshoot-claude-code-installation-and-authentication.md — directly covers Bedrock authentication checks and model availability for failing requests.

issue: ne of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: Log in to HackerRank for Work, select your profile icon, choose Teams Management, go to the Teams tab, select the relevant team, open the Users tab, locate the user, and select the delete icon in the Action column to remove them.
justification: Anchored in data/hackerrank/settings/teams-management/2203617737-manage-team-members.md — directly covers removing a team member from a HackerRank team.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: Open your Claude organization settings (claude.ai/admin-settings/organization or platform.claude.com/settings/identity), click Setup SSO under Global access settings, follow the IdP-specific guide to create a SAML application using the provided SP metadata, test single sign-on, then configure group mappings or JIT/SCIM so students are assigned correctly. Before you begin, verify your login domain via a DNS TXT record and ensure you have IdP admin access and Primary Owner permissions.
justification: Anchored in data/claude/identity-management-sso-jit-scim/13132885-set-up-single-sign-on-sso.md — directly covers SSO setup steps and IdP configuration for Claude organizations, which is the relevant mechanism for centralized student access.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the US Virgin Islands, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for Visa credit cards, but not for Visa debit cards; if a merchant refuses your Visa debit card or requires more than $10 on a credit card, notify your card issuer.
justification: Anchored in data/visa/support.md — directly covers merchant minimum limits for Visa cards, including the US Virgin Islands exception for credit cards.
